entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's platform that must move toward contextual matching visualizations for hiring

entities.name: Bundles of Skills
entities.context: Framework viewing candidates as unique configurations of strengths/weaknesses rather than stack-ranked individuals

entities.name: Contextual Matching
entities.context: Visualization approach where recruiters define acceptable trade-offs rather than searching for unicorns

entities.name: Comparative Advantage
entities.context: Economic principle that capability is about complementing existing systems, not being best at everything

entities.name: ATS
entities.context: Applicant Tracking System that uses scalar metrics (1-10) which flattens multidimensional human capability

entities.name: Scalar Metrics
entities.context: Problematic approach of rating candidates 1-10 that leads to averaging rather than optimizing

entities.name: Trade-off Navigation
entities.context: Core hiring philosophy that no candidate is objectively better, only differently fit based on contextual trade-offs

relationships.context: Platform must move toward contextual matching visualizations
Framework mirrors economic principle of complementary capability mix
Standard ATS logic uses 1-10 ratings that flatten complexity
Contextual matching operationalizes the bundles of skills philosophy
Trade-off navigation is the practical application of viewing candidates as skill bundles
